places.name: Pizzeria a Taglio Angelo e Simonetta

notes: Page is JS-rendered Angular SPA with aggressive client-side redirect (it auto-rotates the URL through related pizza dish pages on load), so a plain DOM scrape returns the wrong dish. Data extracted from the JSON-LD (schema.org QAPage) embedded in the SSR HTML, which contains exactly 5 entries (matching answerCount: 5: one acceptedAnswer + four suggestedAnswer). The page lists only 5 places total. TasteAtlas does NOT publish a 1-5 score for this dish: aggregateRating is null in the JSON-LD; the ranking signal is critic upvoteCount (captured as score_upvotes) plus a critic_count visible in the answer text ('according to X and N more food critics'). Street addresses are not in the SSR HTML for individual listings (only Pizzarium Bonci's address bleeds through via a static page header). The dish-detail API at /api/v2/dishes/{id}/restaurants requires the numeric dish id, but the wheretoeat URL does not embed it (the call observed during page load was for a different dish, 264 = Apizza, because of the redirect). Restaurant detail pages are also JS-rendered shells with no per-restaurant address in raw HTML. All 5 places are in Rome, Italy. WebFetch was denied in this environment; extraction was done via Playwright + fetch() against the SSR HTML.
